## Confections.Confection class

Confection class with helper methods for version management. Provides computed properties for effective tags/urls (merged base + version).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class Confection implements IConfectionBase 
```
**Implements:** [IConfectionBase](./ts-chocolate.confections.iconfectionbase.md)

</td><td>


</td><td>

</td></tr>
